diet_end.title: Use Diet mod to check your End food group coverage — dragon, enderman, shulker, chorus

chorus_popped.title: Collect 32 Popped Chorus Fruit (smelt Chorus Fruit — used in End Stone Bricks and purpur crafting)

subtitle.text: Diet mod resets fully on death. The End is not a safe place to forget to eat.

description: The End represents a unique food challenge for Diet mod.
You are in a dimension with no natural light cycle and no soil.
All food must be carried in or grown from chorus plants.
- Dragon meat (End's Delight): covers protein + rare category
CRITICAL: Diet mod resets fully on death.
If you die in the End, your diet reverts to empty.
Bring food from every group before entering the End dimension.
Popped Chorus Fruit is the smelted form used in late-game crafting.
Collect extra chorus plants for purpur block production.
→ Check Diet mod End food coverage [check]
